---
agent: drc-implement
description: Implement an approved plan in incremental steps and validate each step.
---

Implement the approved plan with minimal, focused changes.

Requirements:
1. Execute in small increments.
2. Validate each meaningful step (build/smoke checks as applicable).
3. Apply clean code and SOLID principles in context of Jekyll/Markdown/CSS changes.
4. Keep changes GitHub Pages compatible and avoid unrelated refactors.
5. Finish with a concise handoff to the verify agent.
